title: Ultra Secret Settings
description: Client side mod that brings back Super Secret Settings with more shaders
body:
Ultra Secret Settings is a client side mod that brings back Super Secret Settings with small overhaul and more shaders

Examples of shader in game:

![Notch shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e34c24e82823a4550c47c2cfcafd5d5e4926953.png)

This mod requires [Shaderite](https://modrinth.com/mod/shaderite) to be installed

Current version of the mod successfully brings back all of the older shaders. If you want to help improve this mod with even more shaders visit GitHub
